title: Data Engineering Jobs
tagline: Data engineering, analytics engineering, and data platform roles in the US and worldwide: pipelines, warehouses, Spark, dbt, and Airflow. Listings come straight from company career pages.
description: Data engineering jobs updated daily. Pipeline, warehouse, and data platform roles (Spark, dbt, Airflow, Snowflake) with salaries, from 400,000+ crawled listings.
keywords: data engineering roles (pipelines, warehouses, analytics engineering, data platform)
titleInclude: data engineer|analytics engineer|data platform|data infrastructure|\betl\b|data warehouse

siblings.label: Data Science and Analytics Jobs: scientist and analyst roles
Python Developer Jobs: backend, data, and platform roles
AI and ML Jobs: AI-first roles, classified daily

faq.q: How often is this list updated?
faq.a: Once a day. A GitHub Action pulls new data engineering listings from Dreamwork's public API, which crawls company career pages directly (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, and others). Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>F</kbd> for Spark, dbt, Airflow, Snowflake, or warehouse roles.

faq.q: What counts as a data engineering job here?
faq.a: Roles whose title names data engineering work: data engineer, analytics engineer, data platform, data infrastructure, ETL, or data warehouse. Data scientist and analyst roles have their own list.

faq.q: Where does the salary data come from?
faq.a: From the postings themselves. When a posting does not state pay, the column is blank. Nothing is estimated.

faq.q: Can a tool apply to these for me?
faq.a: Yes. Dreamwork matches your resume against every listing here, tailors each application, and can submit them for you. Seeing your matches is free.
